caption: Two men sit in a room in front of a television and a shelf filled with CDs. Both men wear grey t-shirts; the man on the right also wears a necklace with a dark pendant. Above them, a television screen displays the text "OUR STUPID REACTIONS" in large, bold, white letters. An inset video window is centered in the frame, showing a cinematic scene. In the first frame, the inset shows a close-up of a person's clothing and the text "My life doesn't hold more value than my family." In the second frame, the inset widens to show a man and a woman interacting. In the third frame, the inset focuses on a woman's face. In the final frame, the inset shows a close-up of a man's face. Throughout the sequence, the two men in the foreground maintain relatively still expressions while watching the video.
